primary_findings.finding: Family budgets created a nonzero keyboard signal versus the prior all-zero temporal probe.
Mouse-button semantics are still not learned; family budget produced false positives but zero exact or semantic overlap.
Mouse movement is unstable after family budgeting; X Pearson is negative and Y has no variance/undefined.
Prediction still has GPU-underutilized CPU/Python loop periods; vectorized inference is required before larger 4xH200 promotion.

recommended_next_branch.name: action-event auxiliary inside temporal masked-diffusion IDM
recommended_next_branch.recipe_fidelity: Keep noncausal masked action-token diffusion, but add auxiliary event-presence heads/losses for sparse key/button families as an unpublished-detail approximation, not a heuristic postprocessor.
implementation_notes: predict key/button event presence from temporal video/action-token representation during IDM denoising
use event logits only to bias masked token unmasking, preserving action-token sequence output
predeclare calibration on held-out training rows with no target labels
vectorize iterative unmasking to reduce CPU-bound prediction time

checkpoint_policy: Do not checkpoint G005; continue recipe-faithful exploration.
